title: Pan-Seared Beef Cutlet with Bitter Greens
description: A crispy and savory dish featuring a pan-seared beef cutlet served with sautéed bitter greens.

ingredients.name: bitter greens
ingredients.notes: such as kale or broccoli rabe

instructions: Season the beef cutlet with salt and pepper.
Dredge the beef cutlet in crispy bread crumbs, pressing gently to adhere.
Heat olive oil in an oven-safe skillet over medium-high heat.
Sear the beef cutlet for 2-3 minutes per side, or until browned.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and cook for 8-10 minutes, or until the beef reaches an internal temperature of 130°F (54°C) for medium-rare.
While the beef is cooking, heat a separate skillet over medium heat.
Add a tablespoon of olive oil and sauté the bitter greens until wilted.
Season the greens with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve the beef cutlet with the sautéed bitter greens and a sprinkle of crispy bread crumbs.
Drizzle with garlic butter, if desired.
